name: Quantum Network Stack
summary: A layered model of how quantum links, repeaters, entanglement management, and classical coordination combine into a usable network.
whenToUseIt: Use it when explaining why quantum networking is more than just sending qubits down a fiber.
steps: Define the physical link and qubit carrier.
Add repeater or swapping logic where distance demands it.
Include the classical timing and control channel.
Measure performance in fidelity, rate, and loss tolerance.
example: A working quantum network requires both a fragile quantum channel and a reliable classical coordination layer. Ignoring either one produces a fantasy architecture.
